basics.name: Vraj Shah
basics.label: Product Engineer
basics.summary: Product engineer specialising in frontend with 6 years at high-growth startups. Built component libraries, server-driven UI systems, and real-time interfaces from scratch. I care deeply about performance, visual craft, and code that scales.

work.name: Wavelength
highlights: Designed and developed a user modeling agent that builds vector images of users from scratch from both product & tech aspects
Architected a rudimentary custom memory system for the agents

work.name: Induced AI (Backed by Sam Altman, shut down Dec 2025)
highlights: Worked directly with founder & COO across backend, DevOps, applied AI, and design engineering on multiple client products

Oximy (enterprise AI observability): Architected LLM API proxy processing production traffic with <50ms overhead; engineered Redis-based distributed policy engine for sub-millisecond rule evaluation; built real-time analytics dashboard for metrics and logs

Built AI platform reducing analyst research from weeks to minutes — structured company profiling, RAG-based agents, long-running workflow harness with step-level traceability across Frontend, Backend, and Worker layers, persistent agent state in MongoDB, and migrated to S3 for horizontal scaling
DNTEL: Built dynamic form rendering framework and document processing pipeline
Induced Stack: Authored internal reusable package system covering email, auth, and notifications

work.name: Loop Health (YC W20)
highlights: Built fullstack claims support tool saving ~9,000 agent hours monthly reducing context switching dependency on external tools
Designed a claim status normalisation layer integrated with 10+ TPAs for accurate claim status tracking, reducing support tickets by 50%
Implemented feature flagging and A/B testing infrastructure using Flagsmith, enabling controlled rollouts, experimentation and data-driven product decisions across teams
Owned features across 8 different projects along with initiatives in product excellence & developer experience

work.name: Bluelearn (Shut down Apr 2024)
highlights: First engineering hire, built & led a 5-person team. Established tech stack, coding standards & devops processes from scratch
Created custom Tailwind-based headless component library (pre-ShadCN era) used across all frontend products enabling consistent UI with minimal duplication
Built real-time chat system from scratch using Socket.IO (5,000+ messages/day) and Redis-backed reactive ranking system for hiring platform
Engineered internal services replacing 15L+ in annual external tool costs: IP-based user tracking and custom push notification system with granular SQL-powered targeting
Architected server-driven UI system for React Native platform; JSON schema from backend controlled dynamic UI rendering enabling rapid product experimentation without app releases

projects.name: Hypersift
projects.description: Real-time communication platform for AI-driven recruitment screening: captures and stores audio-video recordings, streams audio to Deepgram for live transcription, and pipes transcripts through an LLM for candidate evaluation. Built as a freelance engagement.

projects.name: Dooreye
projects.description: Privacy-first neighbourhood security app. Backend in Go + Postgres, React Native frontend with Unistyles.

projects.name: Hackathon Check-in Backend
projects.description: Full-stack check-in system for hackathon participant management, built for HackSVIT

highlights: Led branding, tech, and team of 20
